changelog:
THE SOVEREIGN UPDATE (v6.0):
- [SYSTEM] The Quantum Gate: Completely rebuilt authentication. Silky smooth AJAX login that intercepts your Master Passcode, decrypts your E2E Vault, and logs you in simultaneously in milliseconds without page reloads.
- [SYSTEM] The Lighthouse Protocol: An opt-in headless directory. Transmit your coordinates to a central beacon to be discovered organically, or stay completely hidden in Bunker Mode.
- [UI] Control Room: Fixed checkbox alignment issues on mobile devices for Bunker Mode and Lighthouse Protocol toggles.
